title: Dekton 13'' Toolbox With Lift Out Carry Tray-13" (32cm)| Dimensions: 150mm X 320mm X 135mm| Ideal For Engineers, Workshops And Tool Storage| Durable Carry Handle| Durable Plastic Storage Solution
features: Compact and Functional Design: With dimensions of 150mm x 320mm x 135mm, the Dekton 13" Toolbox offers a compact and space-efficient storage solution perfect for organizing tools in any setting. Its size makes it ideal for engineers, workshops, and home tool storage, ensuring you have your essentials close at hand without taking up too much space.

Convenient Lift-Out Carry Tray: This toolbox features a practical lift-out carry tray that provides additional storage options and easy access to frequently used tools. The tray helps keep smaller items organized and easily reachable, making it simple to grab what you need quickly and efficiently.

Durable and Reliable Construction: Crafted from high-quality, durable plastic, the Dekton Toolbox is built to withstand the rigors of everyday use. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, so you can trust it to protect and organize your tools reliably.

Ergonomic Carry Handle: Equipped with a durable carry handle, this toolbox offers comfortable and secure transportation. The handle is designed for ease of use, allowing you to carry your tools to different locations without straining your hands or wrists.

Versatile Storage Solution: Ideal for a range of applications, from professional engineering tasks to DIY home projects, the Dekton 13" Toolbox is a versatile storage solution. It provides ample space to organize your tools, parts, and accessories efficiently, helping you maintain a tidy and productive work environment.
description: Elevate your tool organization with the Dekton 13" Toolbox with Lift-Out Carry Tray, expertly crafted to meet the demands of engineers, workshop professionals, and anyone in need of a reliable storage solution. Designed with precision and durability in mind, this toolbox features dimensions of 150mm x 320mm x 135mm, making it the perfect size for a range of tools and accessories. The compact yet spacious design ensures that you have ample room to store your essential tools, while still maintaining easy portability and access. The tray is securely housed within the main compartment and can be easily removed and replaced, making organization and retrieval hassle-free. The Dekton Toolbox is constructed from high-quality, durable plastic, ensuring it can withstand the rigors of daily use in demanding environments. The robust material resists impacts and abrasion, providing long-lasting protection for your tools and keeping them in excellent condition. The durable plastic construction also makes the toolbox lightweight, facilitating easy handling and transportation. Equipped with a sturdy carry handle, this toolbox offers comfortable and secure grip, allowing you to carry your tools with confidence. The handle is ergonomically designed to reduce strain and provide optimal balance, making it ideal for both short trips and longer journeys. In addition to its functional design, this toolbox features a sleek and modern aesthetic that complements any workshop or tool storage area.
